title: CustomEmojiQueryInput.filter_space_id owns String unnecessarily
description: CustomEmojiQueryInput.filter_space_id is Option<String> while every other input struct in methods/mod.rs uses &str borrows via a lifetime parameter (MessageQueryInput, MessageCreateInput, PresenceStatusSetInput, CustomEmojiCreateInput, SpaceInviteCreateInput, SpaceBanCreateInput all take 'a lifetimes). The owned String forces callers to allocate or clone even though the value is consumed in a single serde_json::json\! call and immediately dropped. Fix: change to Option<&'a str> with a lifetime on the struct, consistent with all sibling input types. Impact: one unnecessary heap allocation per custom_emoji_query call.
